title: Agent Skills Standard and SKILL.md Anatomy · Protocol Recall
summary: Create a minimal standards-conforming skill for a repeated review workflow. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a valid focused agent skill after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create the required SKILL.md and optional scripts, references, and assets with valid names.
Write valid name and description metadata within specification constraints.
Write imperative workflow steps, boundaries, inputs, outputs, and verification criteria.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

# Add typed, bounded protocol increments below.

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
review case — Use a changed review case for agent ext skill standard that tests this competency: Keep skill logic portable while documenting host-specific integrations separately.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Inspect the Portable Contract trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for keep skill logic portable while documenting host-specific integrations separately.

content.text: For Portable Contract, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: Name the Portable Contract precondition or invariant that the review case must preserve.

Trace this concrete case before choosing: Use a changed review case for agent ext skill standard that tests this competency: Keep skill logic portable while documenting host-specific integrations separately.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: A skill should hard-code one machine layout.

stimulus.title: Portable Contract case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case for agent ext skill standard that tests this competency: Keep skill logic portable while documenting host-specific integrations separately.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A skill should hard-code one machine layout.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Keep skill logic portable while documenting host-specific integrations separately. Artifact under review: a valid focused agent skill.

options.text: The Portable Contract record says a valid focused agent skill looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. This does not resolve separate evidence from confidence.

For separate evidence from confidence, apply Portable Contract without its stated preconditions, omit the a valid focused agent skill trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Portable Contract for a valid focused agent skill.
The record names the assumption, applies Portable Contract, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
